---
title: "08_functionAndStructureModeling"
author: "Christian Anderson"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---
--------
--------
--------
this version uses a lagged model in rate modeling to increase number of samples. Idea: see what phenotypes have effect from one visit to next, versus from first to last
--------
--------
--------
--------

# options
```{r}
# dev.off()  # Turn off the current graphics device
# options(device = "RStudioGD")
# quartz()
```


# Packages
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide', echo = TRUE}
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(reshape2)
library(purrr)
library(GGally)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)
library(vcd)
library(UpSetR)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
# library(BiocSingular)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(viridis)
library(knitr)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(zoo)
library(corrplot)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(openxlsx)
library(plotly)
# library(scater)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(mgcv)
library(zoo)
library(tools)
library(mice)
library(grDevices)
# library(limma)
library(ggrepel)
library(networkD3)
library(htmltools)
library(grid)
library(gplots)
library(Metrics)
library(psych)
library(car)
library(stats)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(VennDiagram)
library(ape)
library(SingleCellExperiment)



rm(list = ls())
gc()
```

# functions
```{r}

# function to show notification 
notify.me <- function(message = "R completed"){
  
  message <- paste0("'", message, "'")
  
  command <- paste0( "terminal-notifier -message ", message, " -title 'R Notification' -subtitle 'Completion Notice' -sound /System/Library/Sounds/Ping.aiff")
  return(system(command))
}

```


# Load Data
info and d from sce
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide', echo = TRUE}

wd_path = "~/Documents/LMRI/PRJ2024001/version015/"

# load experiment
sce <- readRDS(paste0(wd_path, "processed_data/sce003.rds"))

d <- left_join(metadata(sce)$d, as.data.frame(colData(sce)) )
info <- metadata(sce)$info
raw <- metadata(sce)$raw

```

# make new directorys for plots
```{r}
path <- paste0(wd_path, "results/modeling/")
if(!dir.exists(path)) {
  dir.create(path, recursive = TRUE)
  
}


VA_modeling_path <- paste0(wd_path, "results/modeling/VA_new/")
if(!dir.exists(VA_modeling_path)) {
  dir.create(VA_modeling_path, recursive = TRUE)
  
}

MT_modeling_path <- paste0(wd_path, "results/modeling/MT_new/")
if(!dir.exists(MT_modeling_path)) {
  dir.create(MT_modeling_path, recursive = TRUE)
  
}

```

# clean data


# _______________________
# what phenotypes to model?
*ensure numeric
```{r}

phenotypes <-  c( "NEOVASC",  "HRDEXUDATE", "INTRARET_PGMT_MIGR", "LOCAL_DECR_AF_VESL_END", "HR_TEMPORAL", "RETHAEM","YELLOWRND","CRYSTALDEP","RET_ATROPH","TYP_LEAK_RPE","FAZ",
                  "BLRPATTERN","RAV","FOVABNORM","FOVDET","ISOS_LOC","CTR_PT_INVOLV","AF_INCREASED_1DD",      
                  "ISOS_LOC","LOSS_ONL","ISOS_BREAK","HR_TEMPORAL","INR_EMPTY_SPC" , "OUTR_EMPTYSPC","SUBRET_NEW_VESL"   ,"CTRPOINT_INVOLVD",
                  "CTRPOINT_INVOL_2","INTRARET_PGMT_MIGR","EZLOSS","CENTER_MICRON", "CENTERMAX_MICRON", "CENTERMIN_MICRON", 
                  "CYLNUMA","SPHNUMA", "AXISA","CYLPMA","SPHPMA", "SPHEQMA",  "myopic",     
                  "FA_mean", "FA_mean_rate",
                 grep("IR0\\d", names(d), value = TRUE), 
                 grep("BRV", names(d), value = TRUE), 
                 grep("DRV", names(d), value = TRUE), 
                 grep("VTV", names(d), value = TRUE), 
                 grep("LRT", names(d), value = TRUE), 
                 grep("RAV", names(d), value = TRUE), 
                 grep("RPE_LK", names(d), value = TRUE), 
                 grep("_rate", names(d), value = TRUE), 
                 grep("ICL", names(d), value = TRUE),
                 grep("_slope_rate", names(d), value = TRUE),
                 grep("avg", names(d), value = TRUE),
                 # grep("km_nn_cluster|severity_of_cluster", names(d), value = TRUE),
                 grep("_sum", names(d), value = TRUE),
                 grep("pseudoprog", names(d), value = TRUE)
                 
                 
                 ) %>% 
  
                grep("FA.*rate", ., value = TRUE, invert = TRUE) %>% 
  unique()
                 

all(sapply(d[, phenotypes] ,is.numeric))

```



#__________

<!-- #__  ___   ___   __ -->
<!-- # modeling vision loss -->
<!-- # *** -->

<!-- #$$ -->
<!-- # * raw values -->
<!-- ## VA_mean -->
<!-- #### subset data to scale and model -->
<!-- * filter out the ones with (rows>0) < 30 -->
<!-- ```{r} -->


<!-- #  variables (rows of value>0) < 30 where FA_mean present -->
<!-- m <- d[!is.na(d$FA_mean),phenotypes] != 0 -->
<!-- vars <- m %>% -->
<!--   colSums(., na.rm = TRUE)  -->

<!-- # variables with > 30 obs of value>0  -->
<!-- deviant_vars <- vars[vars > 30] %>% names() -->

<!-- # how many unique months do these have where FA_mean and var available? -->
<!-- count_unq_months <-  sapply(deviant_vars, function(x){  -->
<!--                     # how many unique months where both FA and var available? -->
<!--                     return( d $month[!is.na(d$FA_mean) & !is.na(d[,x])] %>%  -->
<!--                              unique() %>% -->
<!--                              length() -->
<!--                             ) -->
<!--                   }) -->

<!-- # vars with greater than one unique month observed  -->
<!-- VA_mean_greater_than_one_month <- count_unq_months[count_unq_months>1] %>%  -->
<!--   names() -->

<!-- # setdiff(deviant_vars ,greater_than_one_month  ) # "BLRPATTERN"  "NOABNORMFAF" only have 1 month of observations where >30 records of rows of value > 0 -->

<!-- # subset d with vars of interest  -->
<!-- model_df <- d %>%  -->
<!--   select(month, patID_eye, patID, SEXF, all_of(VA_mean_greater_than_one_month)) -->

<!-- # scale vars of interest -->
<!-- model_df[, VA_mean_greater_than_one_month[-which(VA_mean_greater_than_one_month == "FA_mean")]] <- scale(model_df[, VA_mean_greater_than_one_month[-which(VA_mean_greater_than_one_month == "FA_mean")]]) -->


<!-- ``` -->

<!-- #### model each variable against FA_mean, correcting for SEXF, and random effect eye and patient -->
<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- # exclude the response variable, FA_mean and correction variables -->
<!-- input_phenotypes <- names(model_df)[-which(names(model_df) %in%  -->
<!--                                              c("FA_mean", "FA_mean_rate",  -->
<!--                                                 "month","patID_eye","patID","SEXF")) -->
<!--                                     ] -->

<!-- # for each variable in input_phenotypes, model FA_mean  -->
<!-- # pheno = "FAZ" -->
<!-- results_list <- list(); for (pheno in input_phenotypes){ -->
<!--   # model without month becasue variables already capture time as progression -->
<!--   formula <- as.formula( paste0("FA_mean ~ SEXF  +", pheno,  "+ (1|patID_eye) + (1 | patID)") ) -->

<!--   # model with month -->
<!--   # formula <- as.formula( paste0("FA_mean ~ SEXF + month +", pheno,  "+ (1|patID_eye)") ) -->

<!--   print(formula) -->


<!--   # results_list[[pheno]] <- summary(lm(formula = formula, data = model_df)) -->
<!--   results_list[[pheno]] <- summary(lmer(formula = formula, data = model_df)) -->

<!-- } -->

<!-- ## make results df #### -->
<!-- results_df <- data.frame(Model = character(),  Term = character(),Estimate = numeric(), -->
<!--                          Std.Error = numeric(),t.value = numeric(),Pr = numeric(),stringsAsFactors = FALSE) -->

<!-- # fill df with model values -->
<!-- for (model_name in names(results_list)) { -->

<!--   model_coef <- coef(results_list[[model_name]]) -->

<!--   a_result_df <- data.frame(Model = model_name,  -->
<!--                          Term = rownames(model_coef),  -->
<!--                          Estimate = model_coef[, "Estimate"], -->
<!--                          Std.Error = model_coef[, "Std. Error"], -->
<!--                          t.value = model_coef[, "t value"], -->
<!--                          Pr = model_coef[, "Pr(>|t|)"]) -->

<!--   results_df <- rbind(results_df, a_result_df) -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- # calculate adjusted p value -->
<!-- results_df$q_value <- p.adjust(results_df$Pr, method = "BH") -->

<!-- # filter control variables from results -->
<!-- results_df <- results_df %>%  -->
<!--   filter(!Term %in% c("(Intercept)", "SEXF", "month")) -->


<!-- results_df_filtered <- results_df %>%  -->
<!--   filter(!Model %in% grep("avg_MT|MT0", results_df$Model, value = TRUE)) %>%  -->
<!--   filter(!Model %in% c("mean_parafoveal_rates")) -->

<!-- ### plot #### -->

<!-- # volcano plot of vaa~phenotypes result -->
<!-- VA_by_phenos_volcano <- ggplot(results_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(q_value), color = Model))+ -->
<!--       geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+ -->
<!--       geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value < .05,  Model, NA)), -->
<!--                        size = 4, -->
<!--                        nudge_y = 0.5,   -->
<!--                        show.legend = FALSE,  -->
<!--                        max.overlaps = 20)+ -->
<!--       geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+ -->
<!--       geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+ -->
<!--       theme_bw()+ -->
<!--       # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+ -->
<!--       ggtitle("VA_factor_mean ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1|patID_eye) + (1 | patID)") -->

<!-- ggsave(paste0(VA_modeling_path, "VA_by_phenos_volcano.png"), VA_by_phenos_volcano, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200) -->


<!-- # volcano plot of vaa~phenotypes result -->
<!-- VA_by_phenos_volcano_filtered <- ggplot(results_df_filtered, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(q_value), color = Model))+ -->
<!--       geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+ -->
<!--       geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value < .05,  Model, NA)), -->
<!--                        size = 4, -->
<!--                        nudge_y = 0.5,   -->
<!--                        show.legend = FALSE,  -->
<!--                        max.overlaps = 20)+ -->
<!--       geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+ -->
<!--       geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+ -->
<!--       theme_bw()+ -->
<!--       # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+ -->
<!--       ggtitle("VA_factor_mean ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1|patID_eye) + (1 | patID)") -->

<!-- ggsave(paste0(VA_modeling_path, "VA_by_phenos_volcano_filtered.png"), VA_by_phenos_volcano_filtered, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200) -->

<!-- notify.me("VA by phenos done") -->

<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ## FA1  -->

<!-- #### subset data to scale and model -->
<!-- * filter out the ones with (rows>0) < 30 -->
<!-- ```{r} -->


<!-- #  variables (rows of value>0) < 30 where FA1 present -->
<!-- m <- d[!is.na(d$FA1),phenotypes] != 0 -->
<!-- vars <- m %>% -->
<!--   colSums(., na.rm = TRUE)  -->

<!-- # variables with > 30 obs of value>0  -->
<!-- deviant_vars <- vars[vars > 30] %>% names() -->

<!-- # how many unique months do these have where FA1 and var available? -->
<!-- count_unq_months <-  sapply(deviant_vars, function(x){  -->
<!--                     # how many unique months where both FA and var available? -->
<!--                     return( d $month[!is.na(d$FA1) & !is.na(d[,x])] %>%  -->
<!--                              unique() %>% -->
<!--                              length() -->
<!--                             ) -->
<!--                   }) -->

<!-- # vars with greater than one unique month observed  -->
<!-- FA1_greater_than_one_month <- count_unq_months[count_unq_months>1] %>%  -->
<!--   names() -->

<!-- # setdiff(deviant_vars ,greater_than_one_month  ) # "BLRPATTERN"  "NOABNORMFAF" only have 1 month of observations where >30 records of rows of value > 0 -->

<!-- # # subset d with vars of interest  -->
<!-- # model_df <- d %>%  -->
<!-- #   select(month, patID_eye, patID, SEXF, FA1, all_of(FA1_greater_than_one_month)) -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # scale vars of interest -->

<!--   select(month, patID_eye, patID, SEXF, all_of(VA_mean_greater_than_one_month), FA1) -->

<!-- # scale vars of interest, not response variable  -->
<!-- model_df[, c( VA_mean_greater_than_one_month)] <- scale(model_df[, c( VA_mean_greater_than_one_month)]) -->

<!-- #^ modeling with VA_mean variables because some filtered out for FA1 varirable filtering  -->


<!-- ``` -->

<!-- #### model FA1, correcting for SEXF, month, and random effect eye -->
<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- # exclude the response variable, FA1 -->

<!--   # model without month becasue variables already capture time as progression -->

<!--   print(formula) -->

<!--   results_list[[pheno]] <- summary(lmer(formula = formula, data = model_df)) -->

<!-- } -->

<!-- ## make results df #### -->

<!--                          Std.Error = numeric(),t.value = numeric(),Pr = numeric(),stringsAsFactors = FALSE) -->

<!-- # fill df with model values -->

<!--                          Term = rownames(model_coef),  -->
<!--                          Estimate = model_coef[, "Estimate"], -->
<!--                          Std.Error = model_coef[, "Std. Error"], -->
<!--                          t.value = model_coef[, "t value"], -->
<!--                          Pr = model_coef[, "Pr(>|t|)"]) -->

<!--   filter(!Term %in% c("(Intercept)", "SEXF", "month")) -->

<!-- # calculate adjusted p value -->
<!-- results_df$q_value <- p.adjust(results_df$Pr, method = "BH") -->


<!-- # filter out unwanted variables -->
<!-- results_df <- results_df %>%  -->
<!--   filter(!Model %in% c("FA_mean")) -->

<!-- results_df_filtered <- results_df %>%  -->
<!--   filter(!Model %in% c(grep("avg_MT|MT0", results_df$Model, value =TRUE), "mean_parafoveal_rates" ) ) -->

<!-- # volcano plot of vaa~phenotypes result -->
<!-- FA1_by_phenos_volcano <- ggplot(results_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(q_value), color = Model))+ -->
<!--       geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+ -->
<!--       geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value < .05,  Model, NA)), -->
<!--                        size = 4, -->
<!--                        nudge_y = 0.5,   -->

<!--       theme_bw()+ -->

<!--       geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+ -->

<!--                        size = 4, -->
